# Pico Micropayments

Pico sells pay-per-unlock content links ($0.10–$2.00). AI agents are
first-class buyers: no account, no API key, no browser — just an HTTP
402 flow settled with native CSPR on the Casper Network.

## How to buy content (for agents)

1. Discover: GET /api/casper/discover
   Returns { items: [{ id, title, description, priceUsd, paymentEndpoint }] }.

2. Quote: GET /api/casper/content/{id}
   Returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements:
   { accepts: [{ scheme: "casper-native-transfer", network, payTo,
     amountMotes, transferId }] }

3. Pay: send a native CSPR transfer of amountMotes to payTo, with
   transferId as the u64 memo, on the named Casper network
   (casper-test = testnet, casper = mainnet).

4. Redeem: retry GET /api/casper/content/{id} with header
   X-Casper-Deploy-Hash: <your deploy hash>.
   While the deploy is unconfirmed you get 402 { pending: true } —
   retry every few seconds. On success: { contentUrl, title }.

Machine-readable manifest: /.well-known/x402
EVM rail (USDC on Base, standard x402): /api/content/{id}

## Notes

- Testnet CSPR is free: https://testnet.cspr.live/tools/faucet
- Payments are verified on-chain server-side; only executed transfers
  with the correct recipient and amount unlock content.
- Minimum transfer on Casper is 2.5 CSPR (network rule).
